side_effects.description: Tiredness when pinning GHK-Cu and Glutathione at the same time; improved when spacing doses apart and after 5 total doses
Irritation and burning sensation in belly fat during liquid dispersal with subcutaneous injection of 200mg/ml glutathione

protocol_notes: User stacked GHK-Cu with Glutathione (200mg/ml). Initial protocol involved pinning both at same time; switched to opposite times of day (moved GHK-Cu to evening, Glutathione to morning based on context). Subcutaneous injection site: belly fat. Fatigue was expected side effect of Glutathione initiation and resolved within 1-2 weeks.
